name: BoMill AB (publ)
summary: BoMill AB provides grain quality sorting solutions. It offers TriQ, a process capacity grain quality sorting solution; and IQ, a grain sorting solution for laboratory use. The company also provides support services, such as customer care, Trac remote access, and installation services. It serves seed cleaning, producer, elevator/terminal, malt house, and organic farming, as well as flour, semolina, and feed mill industries. The company sells quality sorting technology and know-how throughout Europe, North America, and Australia through its own sales organization or agents/distributors. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Malmo, Sweden.
